title: PipeShare presence 500 fix and boot perf (dbg132)
description:
Customer support presence heartbeats were returning HTTP 500 on the OVH server for all legacy numeric user ids (Kat, Mike, etc.). The cp_support_presence table stored user_id as UUID while OVH Postgres users still use numeric TEXT ids, so every POST /saas/support/presence failed with invalid input syntax for type uuid.

This release migrates support presence/chat/remote user id columns to TEXT (matching user_company_membership), adds frontend exponential backoff on failed heartbeats so 500s do not retry-storm, dedupes parallel identical file-tree fetches, and defers workspace-layout server fetch plus customer-support init until after first paint.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Fix presence HTTP 500: migrate cp_support_* user id columns UUID → TEXT on OVH.
Presence heartbeat exponential backoff on errors (max 5 min); no retry storm.
Defer customer-support init and portal-workspace-layout fetch until after first paint.
Dedupe in-flight identical /api/files/tree requests in portal-files-api.
